creator: support@simplerezo.com
text:
Since I have upgraded some servers to FreeBSD 8, the port sysutils/idled doesn't work anymore.

It fails with error: "too many users.  Recompile with higher 'MAXUSERS' setting."

By default MAXUSERS is set to 100 in idled.h, but there are about 275 lines in utmp file.

Fix: 

Increase MAXUSERS in idled.h (see atachment).
How-To-Repeat: Install sysutils/idled on a FreeBSD 8 system.
